subject: Human Resources
title: What Is Total Rewards
description: A 60-second lesson on What Is Total Rewards.

hook.text: An employee compares two job offers. One pays $10K more. The other has better benefits, flexibility, and growth. Which is better?

buildup.text: Total rewards is everything an employee receives—compensation, benefits, recognition, development, and work-life balance.

discovery.text: WorldatWork's model includes five elements: compensation, benefits, work-life effectiveness, recognition, and development.

twist.text: Most employees only see their salary. Companies that communicate total rewards help people understand the full value they receive.

climax.text: Total rewards statements—showing the complete picture—increase perceived value by 30% without adding any cost.

punchline.text: Salary is one number. Total rewards is the whole story.

quiz.question: What does total rewards include beyond salary?
options: Benefits, recognition, development, and work-life balance
